basic_details.job_title: Eastern Coalfields Executives Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Eastern Coalfields has published the Vigilance Department Posting (Finance Discipline) Notification 2026 on its official website. The recruitment drive aims to fill 1 Vigilance Department Posting (Finance Discipline) position. Candidates in E4 grade and above with a minimum of 10 years of experience in the Finance Discipline are eligible to apply via email until 22 July 2026. Candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and application details below.

qualification.education_qualification: E4 grade and above with minimum 10 years experience in Finance Discipline
qualification.details: E4 grade and above with minimum 10 years experience in Finance Discipline

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Eastern Coalfields Vigilance Department Posting (Finance Discipline) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Eastern Coalfields Executives Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Eastern Coalfields Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Eastern Coalfields Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: E4 grade and above with minimum 10 years experience in Finance Discipline

content_sections.heading: Eastern Coalfields Executives Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Eastern Coalfields Vigilance Department Posting (Finance Discipline) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Eastern Coalfields Executives Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Eastern Coalfields Vigilance Department Posting?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 22nd July 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Vigilance Department Posting (Finance Discipline) in Eastern Coalfields.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum eligibility criteria for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be at E4 grade and above with a minimum of 10 years of experience in the Finance Discipline.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST category candidates for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their resume and required documents via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q6. What is the official website of Eastern Coalfields?
faq.answer: The official website of Eastern Coalfields is www.easterncoalfields.in. You can visit this site for more information and updates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is ECL/C-5(D)/EE/Notification/26/Vigilance/1658.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this posting?
faq.answer: This is a Full Time job opportunity.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the posting?
faq.answer: The posting is in West Bengal.

faq.question: Q10. What is the notification date?
faq.answer: The notification date for this recruitment is 17th July 2026.
